question: When does the app sync balances from E*TRADE?
options: Manual sync + sync-on-open + best-effort end-of-day sync
context: Depends on 3f1b6b21 (E*TRADE API). Constraint: E*TRADE OAuth 1.0a tokens expire at midnight ET daily and idle after 2h (renewable while active), so unattended sync only works on days the token is still alive; full re-auth needs an interactive verification code.
